finding: Byte-parity proof: ran ziee-original vs package generator in write mode from `ui/` cwd and diffed the emitted committed artifacts. stateMatrix.generated.ts, STATE_MATRIX.md, galleryCoverage.generated.ts, overlay-registry.generated.json — ALL IDENTICAL. The config-driven anchor swap (HERE→resolveGalleryConfig(cwd)) preserves output exactly; every new config field defaults to ziee's historical hardcode.

The seed-registry gate is run by BOTH the ui workspace (cwd=ui, default srcDir) AND the desktop workspace (cwd=desktop/ui, `--src src`). Preserved the `--src` override (now resolved against CFG.__cwd == process.cwd()) and kept outputs anchored on SRC (not galleryDir), so desktop's `--src src` still lands in desktop/ui/src/dev/gallery. `--check` PASSES from both cwds (ui: 39 modules; desktop: 9 modules). desktop/ui/package.json repointed to the package path.

Cross-session container reaping is liveness-gated by the SHARED lock dir keyed by {pid,runId} (port-manager.liveRunIds()), never a per-worktree file a sibling session can't see — so a concurrent E2E session's LIVE Postgres container is never `docker rm -f`ed mid-run. Container filter is scoped to THIS session's `${prefix}-${sessionNs}-` namespace. Mirrors ziee's proven global-setup cross-session safety; the generic port-manager carries the same {pid,runId} liveness core.

gen-testid-registry is DEFERRED (not moved): the committed registry now lives in the kit package (1590 ids incl kit-src ids like `app-root`), but ziee's generator writes the deleted ui path + walks only ui+desktop (1588). It's mid kit-extraction migration and can't be cleanly parameterized without resolving that. Per the STOP-rule it's left app-side untouched (ziee behaves identically). The provisional `testidOut` config field was removed → no dead config surface.

`@ziee/test-e2e` tsc/validate = 0 (npx tsc --noEmit). `@ziee/gallery` tsc = 0 (unchanged src). playwright/visual.config.ts tsc = 0 (temp project extending the package tsconfig). ziee `ui` tsc = 0 + `desktop/ui` tsc = 0 after the vite.config + package.json edits. All 8 moved .mjs + cli + gallery-config pass `node --check`. 17 relocated unit tests pass via `node --test`.

Additive: ziee's e2e (playwright.config.ts, global-setup.ts, fixtures/*, specs) is UNCHANGED — @ziee/test-e2e is a fresh-app scaffold, not a repoint. The 14 repointed ui npm scripts + desktop's 2 all resolve + behave identically (byte-parity for the generators; seed-registry --check passes). gen-testid-registry left app-side. No behavioral change to any ziee developer command.

The E2EConfig seam carries every ziee hardcode as a parameter: server command / base URL / test dir / testIgnore / viewport / timeout / workers (preset) + dockerComposeTemplate / containerNamePrefix / basePgPortEnv / configDir / envFile / uiBuild(dedupe list) / serverWarmup(command) / firstRunSetup (global-setup). ZERO ziee paths baked in. definePlaywrightPreset + defineDesktopPreset both consume it; presets pass globalSetup/teardown as MODULE PATHS (Playwright requires file paths, not fn refs) via PresetPaths.

B4: galleryAliasPlugin/galleryCoveragePlugin imports repointed ./plugins/*.js → @ziee/gallery/vite/*.js (workspace symlink node_modules/@ziee/gallery, exports `./vite/*`), and the two local dup plugin files git-rm'ed (they were byte-identical to the package copies — proven by diff). Boot smoke: gallery vite dev server serves /gallery.html AND the alias-plugin-rewritten /dev-gallery.html with no load errors. Dev-server risk (flagged in the prior chunk's BOUNDARY) cleared.

`pg` and `dotenv` are imported LAZILY (dynamic import inside waitForPostgres / the envFile branch) so a suite with no dockerComposeTemplate/envFile needn't install them; they're peer/dev deps. @playwright/test is the only hard peer. The whole Postgres block is skipped when dockerComposeTemplate is omitted (a desktop/headless suite managing its own DB), and teardown is then a no-op.

git status shows ZERO changes to any api-client/types.ts, openapi.json, .rs, migration, or .sql. Because the moved generators reproduce their artifacts byte-identically, testIds.generated.ts / galleryCoverage.generated.ts / stateMatrix.generated.ts / overlay-registry.generated.json are also unchanged on disk. Pure test tooling — no Rust/OpenAPI/generated-types surface touched.

defineDesktopPreset boots the Tauri/headless dev server via a webServer block (command/url/timeout/reuseExistingServer from cfg.webServer) and points every test at cfg.baseURL (default http://localhost:1420), workers=4, 300s timeout — mirroring desktop/ui/playwright.config.ts. Stays app-agnostic (no ziee-specific `npm run dev`; the app supplies the command). The full-stack preset instead relies on global-setup's per-run Postgres + per-test backend fixtures.

The overlay-primitive import predicate was ziee-specific inline (`@/components/ui` + the app-layout Drawer path). Generalized to isKitSource(source) over CFG.overlayKitImports where each P matches `source===P || startsWith(P+'/')`. Default = ziee's exact two specifiers → byte-identical overlay-registry.generated.json (proven). A different app sets its own kit import roots without touching the walk logic.
